memory.summary: I have free time now, but with low energy and high stress from my term project, I should prioritize the quick chore before relaxing.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore to clear it from the list.
goals.rationale: The task is marked as 'instant win' and already completed (progress 1.0), but since it has a deadline of Monday, ensuring it is formally done now removes immediate cognitive load before focusing on the upcoming term project.

agent.last_reasoning: Project progress is 1.0% with a Thu deadline; working now prevents last-minute stress while the afternoon is free. This clears cognitive load for the high-priority chore later without sacrificing sleep, though leisure remains an option if energy drops.
